response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload performance analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is heavily focused on full-stack web development, DevOps tooling, and open-source web platforms, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or low-level system optimization for AI workloads.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering skills across multiple languages and platforms
Proven experience in open-source contributions and developer tooling
Demonstrated ability to lead and teach through workshops and community initiatives
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC, IP modeling, or AI accelerator hardware
Lacks background in deep learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
Education is a BS in CS with no advanced degree or hardware-focused research
